name: ts-bmp
description: A pure TypeScript BMP encoder and decoder with zero dependencies
author: Chris Breuer <chris@stacksjs.org>

scripts.release: bun --bun run changelog:generate && bunx --bun bumpx prompt --recursive
scripts.release:patch: bun --bun run changelog:generate && bunx --bun bumpx patch --yes
scripts.release:minor: bun --bun run changelog:generate && bunx --bun bumpx minor --yes
scripts.release:major: bun --bun run changelog:generate && bunx --bun bumpx major --yes
